caption: A man with a short beard, a shaved head, and a tattoo on his right arm is recorded in a studio setting against a dark, ribbed acoustic foam wall. He is wearing a plain white t-shirt and black over-ear headphones. Positioned in front of him is a professional microphone mounted on a shock mount, with a label that reads "Rode PodMic". The man is speaking, and his facial expressions and hand gestures shift throughout the sequence. He begins by looking slightly to his right with a closed mouth, then opens his mouth to speak while glancing forward. As the scene progresses, he continues speaking, gesturing with his right hand, and finally looks back toward the right while mid-sentence. The camera angle remains static, focusing on his upper body and the recording equipment.
